pages.text: $(8)Genetics try to be as realistic as possible. Cats will inherit genetics from their parents, both if the parent is a player or an NPC.$(br2)Cat genetics are random and some traits will be more rare than others, but all of them are possibly obtainable. Take good care of that heterochromic!$(br)
pages.title: Genetics

pages.text: $(8)With the genetics system, you can create a custom morph of your own any time you want. Run '/wce info createMorph' to create your first very own character! Choose from many colors, patterns, genes, eye colors, fur length, and even size!$(br)
pages.title: Genetics
